seo.description: Search homes for sale in White Plains, NY. Award-winning schools, luxury properties, NYC commuter-friendly. Median price $1.65M. Expert local guidance.

name: White Plains
tagline: Where Award-Winning Schools Meet Luxury Living
overview: White Plains is consistently ranked among the best places to live in New York State — and for good reason. This picturesque village combines world-class public schools, walkable downtown villages, and meticulously maintained homes on generous lots. The Metro-North Harlem Line delivers residents to Grand Central in under 35 minutes, making White Plains the pinnacle of Westchester County family living.
